_comment: Sample-dataset generation config for the tutorial course. Produces the ~150-run 'sample150' dataset shipped as a GitHub Release asset (see docs/SAMPLE_DATASET_CARD.md). Same parameter domain as main2_data_generation_config.json but a distinct LHS seed, so the sample is NOT a subset of the research dataset. Run: HYDRAI_ML_CONFIG=configs/ml/main2_sample_dataset_config.json python scripts/local/run_main2_local_parallel.py --ntasks 8, then consolidate with scripts/dev/consolidate_training_data.py --base-dir data/training_sample.

random_sample_bounds._comment: Parameter bounds [min, max] — identical to the research config so lessons match the README data card.

parameter_ranges._comment: For grid/structured_grid/full_grid: [min, max, n_points]. Total runs = product of n_points
